info.title: AI Receptionist Reservations
info.description: Reservation-facing API exposed by the Twilio demo app (app.py + reservations_api.py), alongside its Conversation Relay bridge. This wraps Booqable (JSON:API, v4) with business logic — the voice receptionist should call THIS API, never Booqable directly, so it never sees the real BOOQABLE_API_KEY.

servers.description: GuideAnts runs as a Docker container; host.docker.internal is how a container reaches a port on the host machine. The app itself runs bare (no Docker) on port 8080 alongside the Twilio WS bridge. If GuideAnts ever runs outside Docker, change this to http://localhost:8080/api/reservations.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Shared secret set as RECEPTIONIST_API_KEY on the backend. This is a separate key from BOOQABLE_API_KEY — the LLM must only ever know this one.

get.summary: List rentable products the caller can book
get.description: Use this to look up the product_id needed for availability checks and reservations. Prices are in USD.

get.summary: Check whether a product is available for a date range and quantity
get.description: Call this before promising a reservation, and again immediately before creating one, since stock can be taken by another booking in between.

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: Defaults to the account's existing location

200.description: Availability status: available, partial, unavailable, or unknown

get.summary: Find a caller's active reservations by the email or phone they booked with
get.description: Use this to cancel a rental without asking the caller for a confirmation number -- pass the phone number or email they booked with (get_caller_phone_number for their own number). Returns customer_found=false and no reservations if nothing matches. Each reservation includes the order_id needed for cancelReservation, plus the items, dates, and price to read back and confirm with the caller before canceling.

200.description: Matching customer and their active reservations

get.description: Use this to look someone up by name, phone, or email. Never read the full list back to a caller -- only use it to find a specific match.

post.summary: Register a caller as a customer, without booking a reservation
post.description: Finds an existing customer by email or phone rather than creating a duplicate -- always safe to call even if the caller might already exist. Use this for a caller who wants a callback (e.g. to buy a product, get a service, or speak to a person) rather than a reservation. Set note to a short reason for the callback, e.g. 'wants to buy an e-bike' or 'asked to speak to a person', so staff know why when they call back.

customer_phone.description: The caller's phone number, if given

note.description: Why the caller wants follow-up, e.g. 'wants to buy an e-bike' or 'asked to speak to a person'

200.description: The registered customer, including customer_id and whether the note was recorded

post.summary: Create a reservation for a caller
post.description: Finds or creates the customer, creates the order, books the requested items, and — unless auto_reserve is set to false — immediately reserves it. Only call this after confirming the products, dates, and price with the caller. Before calling: you must have collected customer_name plus at least one of customer_email or customer_phone — ask the caller for whichever they haven't given you yet. If the response shows reserved=false with a reserve_error (e.g. items became unavailable), tell the caller and offer alternatives rather than retrying blindly.

customer_email.description: The caller's email. Optional only if customer_phone is provided instead.

customer_phone.description: The caller's phone number. Optional only if customer_email is provided instead.

location_id.description: Defaults to the account's existing location

auto_reserve.description: Set false to leave as a draft order for staff review instead of reserving immediately

200.description: Reservation result, including order_id, pricing, and whether it was actually reserved
